title: CVE-2026-29790 - dbt-common: commonprefix() doesn't protect against path travers

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — CVE-2026-29790 - dbt-common: commonprefix() doesn't protect 
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/08
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*os.path.commonprefix*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
